emails.subject: ECT - IM WAHA ???
emails.body: ECT IM WAHA Should these not be converted to ENA IM Texas Some time ago we were told this desk was dead and the existing deals would end. This desk is not included in any Texas desk portfolios. The ECT desks are supposed to be inactive however these deals keep rolling and someone created some new ones? If the desk is active should we change it to ENA IM Waha as ECT is no more

emails.subject: Re: ECT - IM WAHA ???
emails.body: Re: ECT IM WAHA These deals should be converted to ENA-IM Texas. Is there a way that you can change all of these deals systematically? D From: Thomas Engel 08/22/2000 08:54 AM
